title: FiscalNote Legislation
description: A legislative measure such as a bill, resolution, or amendment tracked by FiscalNote across federal, state, and international jurisdictions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the legislation record.

shortTitle.description: Short or popular title of the legislation.

number.description: Bill or resolution number such as HR 1234 or S 567.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction code where the legislation was introduced, such as US, US-CA, GB, or EU.

session.description: Legislative session identifier such as 118th Congress.

introducedDate.description: Date the legislation was introduced in ISO 8601 format.

lastActionDate.description: Date of the most recent action on the legislation.

lastAction.description: Description of the most recent action taken.

sponsors.description: List of sponsors and co-sponsors of the legislation.

committees.description: Committees to which the legislation has been referred.

subjects.description: Subject tags associated with the legislation.

fullTextUrl.description: URL to the full text of the legislation.

url.description: URL to the legislation record on the FiscalNote platform.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

Sponsor.description: A sponsor or co-sponsor of legislation.

CommitteeRef.description: A reference to a legislative committee.
